Export.Routine: DVPRL ;DAL/BNT - Digital Veterans Platform Read/Write Functions;5/19/2017 ;;1.0;DIGITAL VETERANS PLATFORM;****; ; Q ; ;p34 -make sure that DVPOS is define - WRITE. ; -modified code to support the new meaning of $X in Cache ; 5.x - WRITE. ; -removed intervening lines that call WBF - WRITE. ; -added code to include option for GTM - WBF. ; -add line for DVPTCPM to read by Wally's non-call back service. ; ; --------------------------------------------------------------------- ; Methods for Read from and to TCP/IP Socket ; --------------------------------------------------------------------- READ(DVPROOT,DVPREAD,DVPTO,DVPFIRST,DVPSTOP) ; N X,EOT,OUT,STR,LINE,PIECES,DONE,TOFLAG,DVPCNT,DVPLEN S STR="",EOT=$C(4),DONE=0,LINE=0 ;From DVPTCPM startup, One time thing *p34 I $D(DVPRBUF)=1 S STR=DVPRBUF,DVPTO=0,DVPFIRST=0 K DVPRBUF ; ; -- READ needs work for length checking ; This needs work!! F R DVPX#DVPREAD:DVPTO S TOFLAG=$T D CHK D:'DVPSTOP Q:DONE . ;I $L(STR)+$L(DVPX)>400 D ADD(STR) S STR="" . S STR=STR_DVPX . F Q:STR'[$C(10) D ADD($P(STR,$C(10))) S STR=$P(STR,$C(10),2,999) . I STR[EOT S STR=$P(STR,EOT) D ADD(STR) S DONE=1 Q . S PIECES=$L(STR,">") . I PIECES>1 D ADD($P(STR,">",1,PIECES-1)_">") S STR=$P(STR,">",PIECES,999) ; Q 1 ; ADD(TXT) ; -- add new intake line S LINE=LINE+1 S @DVPROOT@(LINE)=TXT Q ; CHK ; -- check if first read and change timeout and chars to read I 'TOFLAG,DVPFIRST S DVPSTOP=1,DONE=1 Q ; -- could cause small msg to not process S DVPFIRST=0 S DVPREAD=100,DVPTO=2 ;M2M changed DVPTO=2 Q ; ; ; --------------------------------------------------------------------- ; Methods for Opening and Closing Socket ; --------------------------------------------------------------------- OPEN(DVPPARMS) ; -- Open tcp/ip socket N I,POP S POP=1 D INIT D SAVDEV^%ZISUTL("DVPM2M CLIENT") ;M2M changed name F I=1:1:DVPPARMS("RETRIES") D CALL^%ZISTCP(DVPPARMS("ADDRESS"),DVPPARMS("PORT")) Q:'POP ; Device open ; I 'POP U IO Q 1 ; Device not open Q 0 ; CLOSE ; -- close tcp/ip socket ; -- tell server to Stop() connection I $G(DVPOS)="" D INIT D PRE D WRITE($$XMLHDR^DVPUTL()_"<vistalink type='Gov.VA.Med.Foundations.CloseSocketRequest' ></vistalink>") D POST ; ; -Read results from server close string. **M2M I $G(DVPPARMS("CCLOSERESULTS"))="" S DVPPARMS("CCLOSERESULTS")=$NA(^TMP("DVPM2MRL",$J,"XML")) S DVPROOT=DVPPARMS("CCLOSERESULTS") K @DVPROOT S DVPREAD=20,DVPTO=1,DVPFIRST=0,DVPSTOP=0 S DVPCOK=$$READ^DVPRL(DVPROOT,.DVPREAD,.DVPTO,.DVPFIRST,.DVPSTOP) ; D FINAL D CLOSE^%ZISTCP D USE^%ZISUTL("DVPM2M CLIENT") ; Change name **M2M D RMDEV^%ZISUTL("DVPM2M CLIENT") Q ; INIT ; -- set up variables needed in tcp/ip processing S DVPOS=$S(^%ZOSF("OS")["DSM":"DSM",^("OS")["UNIX":"UNIX",^("OS")["OpenM":"OpenM",1:"MSM") Q ; FINAL ; -- kill variables used in tcp/ip processing K DVPOS,DVPOS,DVPPARMS,DVPPARMS Q ; ; --------------------------------------------------------------------- ; Methods for Writing to TCP/IP Socket ; --------------------------------------------------------------------- PRE ; -- prepare socket for writing S $X=0 Q ; WRITE(STR) ; -- Write a data string to socket ;*p34-removed intervening lines that call WBF. ; I $G(DVPOS)="" D INIT ;*p34-make sure DVPOS is defined. I DVPOS="MSM" W STR Q ; send data for DSM (requires buffer flush (!) every 511 chars) ; GT.M is the same as DSM. ; Use an arbitrary value of 255 as the Write limit. ;IF DVPOS="DSM"!(DVPOS="UNIX")!(DVPOS="OpenM) next line ; ;*p34-modified write to for Cache 5 in case less then 255 char. F Q:'$L(STR) W $E(STR,1,255) D WBF S STR=$E(STR,256,99999) ; Q ; WBF ;Write Buffer Flush - W ! ;p34-included option for GTM I $G(DVPOS)="" D INIT W @$S(DVPOS'["GTM":"!",1:"#") ;*p34 Q ; POST ; -- send eot and flush socket buffer D WRITE($C(4)),WBF:$X>0 Q
